/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libscene_graph_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libscene_graph_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/scene_graph_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/scene_graph_interfaces/msg/fun_object3_d_bounding_box__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/scene_graph_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/scene_graph_interfaces/msg/fun_object3_d_bounding_box_list__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/dali/ros2_ws/build/scene_graph_interfaces:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libscene_graph_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
